keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY SALIVA. Saliva : Merc., Sul. Saliva, acrid : Aru-t., Kre., Merc-c., Nit-ac. Saliva, bloody : Merc., Nit-ac., Pho., Rhus-t. Saliva, diminished : Bell., Kali-bi., Nux-v., Pho., Stram., Sul., Ver-a. Saliva, foul : Lach., Merc., Nit-ac., Petr. Saliva, frothy , snowy, cottony, etc. : Ap., Bell., Berb., Caul., Dulc., Ign., Kali-bi., Lach., Nux-m., Ol-an., Pho-ac., Pho., Pic-ac., Pul., Sabi., Spig. Saliva, gushes of : Carb-v., Nat-m. Saliva, increased : Dig., Dulc., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Stram., Ver-a. Saliva, increased, cough, with : Am-m., Lach., Ver-a. Saliva, increased, headache, with : Epiph., Merc. Saliva, increased, pregnancy, in : Kre., Lob., Zin-s. Saliva, increased, sleep, agg. : Bar-c., Ign., Ip., Lac-c., Lach., Merc., Nit-ac., Pho., Rhus-t., Syph. Saliva, sweet : Cham., Iris., Pho., Plb., Pul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
